cards.title: Only Children Aren't Weirdos, Parents Say
cards.body: Single-child families face persistent stereotypes about being selfish or lonely. One parent challenges these prejudices, noting only children are becoming increasingly common.

cards.title: Can't Afford a Tutor? Your Support Matters Most
cards.body: A parent worries her daughter won't reach potential without private tutoring for grammar school. An advice columnist suggests you may be projecting your own school fears onto your child.

cards.title: Childhood Trauma Affects Adult Relationships
cards.body: A man with dysfunctional parents—one narcissistic, one avoidant—struggled to recognize healthy relationships. Learning to break unhealthy patterns takes time and awareness.

cards.title: Managing Family Anxiety on Holiday
cards.body: A parent discovered she could handle real emergencies better than anticipated worry on family trips. Accepting your family's different relaxation styles helps everyone enjoy vacation.

cards.title: Why Kids Seek Attention (And What Works)
cards.body: Attention-seeking behavior is often a sign your child needs connection, not stricter boundaries. Understanding the root cause helps address the real need.

cards.title: Teaching Kids Decision-Making Before Age 25
cards.body: Brain development continues until age 25, yet children make major choices much earlier. Parents can guide good decision-making by understanding adolescent brain development.

cards.title: Verbal Abuse From Parents Affects Adult Children
cards.body: Interactions leaving you doubting yourself, guilty, or anxious may signal emotional abuse. Learning to recognize and respond to parental abuse helps reclaim your voice.

cards.title: Passport Office Refuses Eight-Year-Old's Application
cards.body: A British parent's youngest child was denied a UK passport despite identical documents accepted for her older siblings. The inconsistency left the family confused about what went wrong.

cards.title: VAT Cut on Theme Parks and Kids' Meals
cards.body: The government reduced VAT from 20% to 5% on family attractions and children's meals. The tax break arrives as schools begin summer break.

cards.title: Obesity Rising Fastest in Young Adults
cards.body: Young adult obesity rates are climbing due to cost of living pressures and unhealthy food availability. Experts warn the pandemic accelerated unhealthy eating patterns.
